message:
fix: multiple service improvements and security hardening

- approval.service: Migrate from in-memory to SQLite persistence
- pipeline.service: Security fix - use Function constructor with arguments
  to prevent command injection in transform operations
- reservation.service: Add cleanup for resolved conflicts (24hr retention)
- context.service: Only show "Relevant Context" header when content exists
- reservation-conflicts: Improve wildcard overlap detection with prefix/suffix
- redaction: Handle Buffer/Uint8Array/Date/Error objects to prevent recursion
- agent-detection: Use found path for version/auth checks
- safety-rules.engine: Fix glob ? to not match / (consistent glob behavior)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
